message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "mobile" as mobile
rectangle "www" as www
rectangle "endpoint" as endpoint
rectangle "haproxy" as haproxy
rectangle "ipfs" as ipfs
rectangle "postgraphile" as postgraphile
rectangle "CITY Custom Net" as city
rectangle "logstash" as logstash
rectangle "dApp" as dApp
rectangle "postgres" as postgres
rectangle "elastic" as elastic
rectangle "prometheus" as prometheus
rectangle "kibana" as kibana

rectangle "webUI" as webUI
rectangle "api - Admin/Write api" as api
rectangle "dashboard" as dashboard
rectangle "dApp - controller" as dAppController

note right of webUI : sign & send events
note right of webUI : browser ext or mobile wallet
note right of webUI : HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
note right of webUI : /ipfs/{CID}
note right of webUI : HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
note right of webUI : User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.

note right of api : /v2 - read/write factom api
note right of api : /ipfs/{CID} - readonly gateway
note right of api : /graphql - readonly graphql queries

note right of dashboard : dashboard query
note right of dashboard : poll()
note right of dashboard : metrics query
note right of dashboard : dApp specific rollup

note right of dAppController : pin entry content on IPFS
note right of dAppController : dApp specific logging
note right of dAppController : dispatch on-chain event

note right of city : livefeed log
note right of city : index event logs
note right of city : dApp specific events
note right of city : sign and dispatch requests
note right of city : read/write signed factom entries

note right of prometheus : HTTP GET /metrics
note right of prometheus : HTTP GET /metrics

note right of kibana : Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXXXX) Balance changes

note right of dApp : Query/Sign

note right of logstash : dispatch on-chain event

note right of elastic : dApp specific logging
